title: Don't Flood My Village
description: savanna village tweak - no more water in savanna village roads
body:
with this datapack savanna villages generate with terracotta decorations, those replace the roads farms, this is because roads structures generate at ground level, if the groud is too steep it can make water blocks get out of the farm and flood the village, so getting rid of them should fix the little problem, that isn't a bug, but can sometimes look ugly in some situations.

have in mind that changing the road structure can get some, to not say all, the house of the village moved to different places, so villages are not going to be the same as vanilla ones so custom seeds will be lost.
